rationale: The response fails to name either tactic at all, using only unresolvable pronoun chains ('it', 'the previous one', 'the other', 'this') so no actual guidance is conveyed; it does not satisfy the task requirement of naming both tactics clearly.
rubric_evidence: It applies after that, but only when the previous one fails.
So we recommend it, unless this happens — in which case use the other.
